news.headline: Charlie Javice convicted for scamming JPMorgan of $175 million by fabricating customer list when selling her startup.
news.summary: A jury was convinced by federal prosecutors that Ms. Javice manipulated a significant portion of her customer list before the sale of her startup, Frank, to the bank.

news.headline: Dow plunges almost 700pts, Nasdaq falls 2.6% in last hour as selling intensifies.
JD Martin Company is expanding representation with Leviton in Oklahoma from April 1st, 2025, boosting access to electrical products.
news.summary: In Edmond, Oklahoma, on March 28, 2025, JD Martin Company is pleased to reveal an enhanced collaboration with Leviton starting on April 1, 2025. Leviton, a renowned leader in electrical wiring devices, lighting controls, and energy management systems, will join forces with JD Martin Company in Oklahoma. This partnership is expected to significantly boost the offerings and services provided by both companies and is set to impact the local industry landscape.

news.headline: Sunset Fishermen Hotel in Playa del Carmen marks 26th anniversary with lively cocktail party for members and guests!
news.summary: In Playa del Carmen, Mexico, on March 21, 2025, Grupo Sunset World honored the 26th anniversary of the Sunset Fishermen hotel. Attendees, including members and guests, enjoyed canapés, cocktails, and a specially made cake to celebrate the occasion.

news.headline: INX Digital Company announced 2024 financial results: $18.2M total operating capital, $34.3M reserve fund, $0.4M trading fees, $18.6M net income.
news.summary: INX Digital Company, Inc. reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. The company had $18.2M in total operating capital, and a reserve fund of $34.3M set aside for customer funds. Trading and transaction fees were $0.4M. The operational loss for 2024 was $13.3M, an improvement of 41% from 2023. Net income was $18.6M, largely due to a non-cash accounting gain. INX focused on becoming a regulated global marketplace for digital assets, emphasizing tokenized Real-World Assets. The platform supported capital raises, token issuances, and compliant secondary trading, with four companies raising capital via primary offerings on INX.One by December 2024.

news.headline: Oakwood Homes introduces Brio Collection in Thompson River Ranch, Johnstown, Colorado, 50 miles from Denver on March 29, 2025.
news.summary: On March 29, 2025, Oakwood Homes will introduce the Brio collection in Thompson River Ranch, a master planned community situated approximately 50 miles from Denver in Johnstown, Colorado. This new collection marks the second addition to the community, offering prospective buyers additional choices for housing options.

news.headline: Bitcoin may hit $110K before retracing to $76.5K, with a whale exploiting $6.2M on Hyperliquid. Fidelity plans a stablecoin launch amid a $5.8T asset management push, and Polymarket faces scrutiny over a $7M Ukraine bet. DWF Labs launches $250M fund for crypto adoption. DeFi market overview shows gains for top 100 cryptocurrencies.
news.summary: Bitcoin price is predicted to hit $110,000 before retesting $76,500, as revealed by Arthur Hayes, citing improved monetary policies. Hayes believes BTC will reach this new all-time high due to easing inflation concerns. Meanwhile, the DeFi sector faced a blow after an unknown whale exploited Hyperliquid’s algorithms, making over $6 million on a memecoin short. Fidelity Investments plans to launch a stablecoin amid a more favorable regulatory climate. Polymarket is under scrutiny for a controversial outcome which raised governance manipulation concerns. DWF Labs launched a $250 million fund for blockchain projects, aiming to drive real-world adoption. The DeFi market mostly ended positively as the BNB Chain-native Four (FORM) token and Cronos (CRO) token were the biggest gainers.

news.headline: Red Rock Resorts to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025. Conference call to follow. NASDAQ: RRR.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Red Rock Resorts, Inc. disclosed that they will reveal their financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 on Thursday, May 1, 2025. The Company, trading under NASDAQ as RRR, will also conduct a conference call on the same day to discuss these results.

news.headline: Minerva University appoints Patrice McMahon, Ph.D., as new provost, effective July 1 after Bellagio residency.
news.summary: Today, on March 28, 2025, President Mike Magee of Minerva University revealed the selection of Patrice McMahon, Ph.D., as the institution's incoming provost. McMahon is set to assume her new role on July 1, following the conclusion of her current residency at The Rockefeller Foundation's Bellagio.

news.headline: Chuck E. Cheese faces difficulty selling $660M bond.
Trump pardons the three co-founders of Bitmex Crypto Exchange - CNBC.
News alert: Earnings report to be released on July 27, 2021. Company expects revenue to reach $10 million in Q2.
Koryx Copper Inc. completes internal restructure through amalgamation with subsidiary, Simplifying corporate structure.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Vancouver, Koryx Copper Inc. (TSXV: KRY) successfully finalized a vertical short-form amalgamation under the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia). This process, completed on March 19, 2025, involved merging with its wholly-owned subsidiary, 1054137 B.C. Ltd. The amalgamation marks a significant milestone for Koryx, consolidating its operations and solidifying its position in the market.

news.headline: Peter Schiff criticizes Bitcoin 'Hodlers' for ignoring gold's 18% rally vs Bitcoin's 11% YTD decline in 2025.
news.summary: Renowned economist Peter Schiff recently criticized Bitcoin's year-to-date decline, contrasting it with gold's quiet but significant 18% rally. In a recent post, Schiff questioned the optimism surrounding the US government's Bitcoin Strategic Reserve and suggested that those holding onto Bitcoin may be neglecting essential market fundamentals. Schiff notably pointed out the stark difference in performance between gold and Bitcoin in 2025, highlighting Bitcoin's 11% year-to-date decline despite media attention and the establishment of a Bitcoin Strategic Reserve. For more details, you can find the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fritz & Co advises Spartan Radar in carve-out deal; technology assets acquired by a Fortune 100 firm.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Fritz & Company I, LLC (Fritz & Company) revealed their role as the Exclusive Financial Advisor to Spartan Radar, Inc. (Spartan Radar) in the carve-out deal related to its enhanced resolution technology. Fritz & Company, a prominent technology investment banking advisory firm, assisted Spartan Radar in this strategic financial move.

news.headline: FDA summary includes initiatives for rare disease drug developers, released two publications on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Silver Spring, Maryland, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration released a summary of recent updates. One notable highlight includes the publication of two initiatives by the FDA's Learning and Education to ADvance and Empower Rare Disease Drug Developers program. This news is part of the agency's ongoing efforts to support innovation in the field of rare disease drug development.

news.headline: Brent Crude futures settle at $73.63/bbl, down 40 cents, 0.54%.
Stock market dips with Nasdaq hit hardest, Amazon and Nike major factors; Dow Jones down, Amazon stock biggest loss.
news.summary: On Friday afternoon, there were significant declines in the major stock indexes with losses expected for the week. Amazon experienced the largest drop on the Dow Jones Industrial Average. The Nasdaq was hit the hardest among the major indexes following an inflation report. This information was covered by Investor's Business Daily in live coverage. The stock market performance indicates a challenging week with noticeable decreases across the board in key indices and notable companies like Amazon and Nike weighing down the Dow.

news.headline: US VP Vance ends remarks in Greenland.
US VP Vance: We think Greenlanders will choose to become independent of Denmark, then we'll have conversations.
Better Together Concert in San Francisco on March 28, 2025, to feature Grace Bowers & The Hodge Podge, benefiting Oakland youth.
news.summary: Oakland's youth will be honored and supported at the annual benefit concert in San Francisco on March 28, 2025. The event aims to raise funds for the Service Learning Program and celebrate the community's achievements. The acclaimed blues artist Grace Bowers & The Hodge Podge is set to headline the concert, promising an electrifying performance. Attendees can look forward to an inspiring evening while contributing to a transformative cause.

news.headline: US VP Vance: A Black Sea ceasefire is almost done.
Florida leaders announce partnership at eMerge Americas Conference to position Florida as global tech and investment hub.
news.summary: In Miami on March 28, 2025, a significant partnership was revealed at the eMerge Americas Conference + Expo. This collaboration, announced by Florida's business and innovation leaders, is designed to position Florida as the top destination and center for worldwide technology, capital, and entrepreneurship. This initiative aims to attract a myriad of innovative business ventures and opportunities to the state, with the goal of solidifying its status as a key player in the global tech and entrepreneurial landscape.

news.headline: RWJBarnabas Health and Rutgers Health to showcase 55 cardiovascular research abstracts at ACC's Annual Expo.
news.summary: The most recent developments in cardiovascular care will be showcased through 55 abstract presentations in West Orange, New Jersey on March 28, 2025. Physician-scientists from RWJBarnabas Health and Rutgers Health are set to present a range of innovative cardiovascular findings and advancements.

news.headline: Inventors from Apple Valley, Calif, innovate Smart Float tool for concrete installations to improve accuracy (RSJ-225).
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, two inventors from Apple Valley, California shared their inspiration for creating a more precise magnesium float tool for concrete installations. The result of their innovation is the SMART FLOAT, which enhances accuracy in smoothing, sealing, and finishing concrete work. This new tool is designed to streamline the process, providing a comprehensive solution for contractors and construction workers.

CFTC pulls advisory on review of risks on crypto-asset clearing.

NYMEX Natural Gas May futures settle at $4.0650/MMBtu.
Miami hair restoration expert Dr. J. Epstein introduces Foundation Aesthetic Hair Restoration Method in March 2025.
news.summary: In Miami on March 28, 2025, NewBeauty revealed the introduction of the Foundation Aesthetic Hair Restoration Method. Spearheaded by Top Doctor J. Epstein, MD, FACS, this pioneering method premiered in March 2025, heralding a new era in hair restoration. Committed to merging state-of-the-art technology...

news.headline: FDA approves Qfitlia (fitusiran) for hemophilia A/B treatment with or without factor inhibitors. Can be given once every 2 months.
news.summary: The FDA has recently approved the medication Qfitlia (fitusiran) for routine prophylaxis in adult and pediatric patients aged 12 and older. This medication can be administered once every 2 months to prevent or reduce the frequency of bleeding episodes. The approval was granted in Silver Spring, Md., on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: Arclin introduces Arclin Firepoint™, a new fire-resistant material for homes. Technology offers unprecedented fire protection.
news.summary: Arclin™, a prominent material science company based in Alpharetta, Georgia, unveiled Arclin Firepoint™ on March 28, 2025, as a breakthrough fire-resistant building material. This innovative product is designed to provide exceptional fire protection for residential properties. Arclin Firepoint™ integrates patented intumescent technology, setting a new standard for safeguarding homes against fires.

news.headline: Independent Bank Corp (NASDAQ: IBCP) to issue 2025 Q1 results on April 24, 2025 at 8:00 am ET. Release on IndependentBank.com.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Independent Bank Corporation (NASDAQ: IBCP) headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on April 24, 2025, around 8:00 am ET. The upcoming earnings report will be accessible on Independent Bank's website, IndependentBank.com, under the "News" segment within the "Investor Relations" section.

news.headline: US VP Vance: We can't ignore Russian and Chinese encroachment.
US VP Vance: The US will invest in the security footprint, including additional naval ships.
Dominion Energy's stock sees better technical performance with Relative Strength Rating upgrade. Will it sustain?
news.summary: Dominion Energy has experienced a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating better technical performance. Investors are questioning whether this positive trend will persist. This development highlights the stock's improved relative price strength, presenting potential opportunities for investment.

news.headline: Mondelez Intl Cl A stock receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. Will it continue?
news.summary: Mondelez International Class A has recently received a boost in its relative strength rating, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. This upgrade suggests that the stock is showing signs of improvement and may continue to do so in the near future. It remains to be seen whether this positive momentum will be sustained in the coming days.

news.headline: CoreWeave's IPO debuts below range at $40 per share, backed by Nvidia, amid AI sector concerns.
news.summary: The initial public offering (IPO) for CoreWeave was set at $40 per share, significantly lower than the anticipated range. This cloud-computing startup supported by Nvidia is serving as a litmus test for the market's interest in artificial intelligence (AI) stocks. Following its IPO debut, CoreWeave experienced a decline amid growing concerns about the future of AI technology.

news.headline: Jessica Keefe promoted to SVP, Head of Operations at BTIS after 20+ years, leading operational excellence and expansion.
news.summary: Jessica Keefe has been appointed as the Senior Vice President, Head of Operations, acknowledging her extensive experience of over 20 years and significant contributions to BTIS's operational success and growth since 2010. Her role has been instrumental in enhancing efficiency and fostering innovation at the company. This announcement was made in ROCKLIN, California on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: Rockpoint Probate Funding's analysis reveals ongoing challenges for US families in probate proceedings, despite their intended functions.
news.summary: A report by Rockpoint Probate Funding, based in El Segundo, California, on March 28, 2025, highlights the ongoing challenges confronted by families in the United States during probate processes. Probate, aimed at verifying wills, resolving debts, and allocating assets, continues to present significant obstacles for many individuals. This analysis sheds light on the struggles faced by families navigating probate procedures, emphasizing the hurdles encountered in the legal validation of wills, debt settlement, and asset distribution.

news.headline: US VP Vance: There are no immediate plans to expand US military in Greenland.
Update on BNB Chain ecosystem: Discover latest developments, metrics, projects, and upgrades from March 17-24, 2025. Explore now!
news.summary: Discover the most recent developments within the BNB Chain network from March 17th to March 24th, 2025. This update includes essential statistics, such as transaction volume, new ventures that have joined the ecosystem, and notable enhancements implemented during this period. Stay informed about the latest advancements and progress within the BNB Chain community during this time frame. For further details, click on the link provided.

news.headline: BNB Chain introduces $100M liquidity initiative to enhance ecosystem, stimulate exchange listings, and support projects.
news.summary: BNB Chain has unveiled a liquidity program worth $100 million aimed at boosting the ecosystem. The initiative will offer incentives for exchange listings and back projects spanning diverse domains such as DeFi, AI, and gaming.

news.headline: Flower and NVIDIA FLARE integration revolutionizes federated learning, merging user-friendly tools with top-notch runtime.
news.summary: Learn how the partnership between Flower and NVIDIA FLARE is revolutionizing the federated learning sector by blending easy-to-use tools with high-performance runtime capabilities for effortless implementation. This collaboration promises to deliver significant advancements in the field, with the potential to enhance learning experiences for millions of users.

news.headline: New app, Together Chat, provides free access to DeepSeek R1 and other advanced AI models in North America for coding, image creation, and more.
news.summary: Introducing a new app from Together Chat that provides complimentary access to the DeepSeek R1 and various AI models. This app aims to improve engagement with open-source resources for coding, creating images, and completing creative projects. Access to these tools is now free of charge, offering users enhanced capabilities for various tasks.

news.headline: Gala Games discontinues GalaCoin, shifts users to Treasure Tapper, rewarding for participation. #cryptocurrency #GalaGames
news.summary: Gala Games has made the decision to discontinue the use of GalaCoin and shift its focus to the new platform, Treasure Tapper. As part of this transition, users will be migrated to the Treasure Tapper platform. They are also offering rewards to users who have participated in GalaCoin in the past. This move comes as Gala Games aims to consolidate its offerings and streamline its services.

news.headline: Celo teams up with Alchemy to boost Web3 development, improving scalability and interoperability as it moves to Ethereum Layer 2. #partnership #scability
news.summary: Celo has announced a partnership with Alchemy to offer developers advanced tools as it shifts towards becoming an Ethereum Layer 2 solution. This collaboration aims to boost scalability and interoperability for the platform. This move is expected to significantly impact Celo's capabilities and expand its reach. The partnership will provide developers with key resources and support as they work on the transition. This strategic decision comes as Celo looks to enhance its infrastructure and performance, paving the way for a more efficient and seamless user experience.

news.headline: Linea hints at big news amid market swings. Livestream event upcoming; stay tuned for announcement. #resilience #marketchallenges
news.summary: Linea will be making a major reveal during a livestream event that will focus on promoting resilience in the face of tough market conditions. Stay tuned for information on this important development.

news.headline: Filecoin's ProPGF program supports public goods with on-chain funding for community-led development, boosting transparency.
news.summary: Introducing ProPGF, Filecoin (FIL) has announced an on-chain funding initiative to back public goods development in its ecosystem. This program aims to boost transparency and community engagement.
